generated_from: User task: v1.8 Freeform Review / Long-Run Autonomy / Extraction Contract slice
validation_command: & { $files = @("public/review/index.html", "tools/fff-state.mjs", "artifacts/artifact-manifest.json", "artifacts/ARTIFACTS.md", "artifacts/sample-project-state.json", "artifacts/current-project-state.json", "artifacts/sample-extraction-payload.json", "artifacts/extraction-contract-smoke-result.json", "artifacts/freeform-review-intake-smoke-result.json", "artifacts/profile-ghost-smoke-result.json", "artifacts/fff-current-review-screenshot.png", "artifacts/fff-review-contact-sheet.png", "docs/review/current-status.md", "docs/review/next-terminal-handoff.md", "docs/review/extraction-contract-review.md", "docs/review/freeform-review-intake.md", "docs/data-model.md", "scripts/operator/open_review.ps1"); $missing = $files | Where-Object { -not (Test-Path $_) }; if ($missing) { Write-Error ("Missing files: " + ($missing -join ", ")); exit 1 }; $manifest = Get-Content artifacts/artifact-manifest.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($manifest.artifact_id -ne "fff-extraction-contract-001") { throw "Manifest artifact id mismatch" }; if ($manifest.review_input_mode -ne "freeform") { throw "Review input mode mismatch" }; $payload = Get-Content artifacts/sample-extraction-payload.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($payload.schemaVersion -ne "fff.extractionContract.v1") { throw "Extraction payload schema mismatch" }; if ($payload.extractedElements.Count -lt 12) { throw "Extraction payload missing expected elements" }; foreach ($type in @("person", "place", "organization", "event", "object", "concept", "document", "visual_asset", "placeholder", "source_reference", "unresolved_decision")) { if (-not ($payload.extractedElements.elementType -contains $type)) { throw ("Missing extraction element type: " + $type) } }; foreach ($jsonFile in @("artifacts/sample-project-state.json", "artifacts/current-project-state.json")) { node tools/fff-state.mjs validate $jsonFile; $state = Get-Content $jsonFile -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($state.metadata.activeArtifactId -ne "fff-extraction-contract-001") { throw ("Active artifact mismatch in " + $jsonFile) }; if (-not ($state.extractionContracts.Count -ge 1)) { throw ("Missing extractionContracts in " + $jsonFile) } }; $summary = node tools/fff-state.mjs summarize artifacts/current-project-state.json | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not ($summary.extractionContractSummary.extractionRunCount -ge 1)) { throw "Extraction summary missing run" }; if (-not ($summary.extractionContractSummary.extractedElementCount -ge 12)) { throw "Extraction summary missing elements" }; @("artifacts/fff-current-review-screenshot.png", "artifacts/fff-review-contact-sheet.png") | ForEach-Object { $item = Get-Item $_; if ($item.Length -le 0) { throw ("Empty visual artifact: " + $_) } }; $extractionSmoke = Get-Content artifacts/extraction-contract-smoke-result.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $extractionSmoke.passed) { throw "Extraction smoke did not pass" }; $freeformSmoke = Get-Content artifacts/freeform-review-intake-smoke-result.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $freeformSmoke.passed) { throw "Freeform review smoke did not pass" }; $handoff = Get-Content docs/review/next-terminal-handoff.md -Raw; @("git pull --ff-only", "fff-extraction-contract-001", "Review Intake Contract", "Resume Prompt", "Toma fate", "brass moth truth", "Council motive") | ForEach-Object { if ($handoff -notmatch [regex]::Escape($_)) { throw ("Missing handoff text: " + $_) } }; $html = Get-Content public/review/index.html -Raw; @("fff-extraction-contract-001", "Extraction Contract", "freeform review allowed", "Claim Ledger", "Timeline View", "Profile/Ghost Flow", "Toma fate", "brass moth truth", "Council motive") | ForEach-Object { if ($html -notmatch [regex]::Escape($_)) { throw ("Missing required text: " + $_) } }; Write-Output "Extraction Contract validation passed" }
